title: A Comparability Protocol for Benchmarking Relational Database Access Layers in Express.js
description: Version 1.12.13 is the complete IST major-revision artifact. It adds and distinguishes CYNTHIA prior work; narrows novelty and compliance claims; reframes RQ2 as backend-stack transfer; archives nine pre-freeze documentation snapshots with SHA-256 evidence; documents and measures shared canonical constructors; quantifies capacity-denominator uncertainty; restricts matched-utilization conclusions to stable 50-70% loads; foregrounds MySQL insert multimodality; and maps every table and figure to its evidence. The primary 25-run benchmark matrix is unchanged. The 37 archived JSON inputs verify, 19 statistical tests pass, and a fresh offline reconstruction regenerates both table directories byte-for-byte.

creators.name: Miotk, Mateusz
creators.affiliation: Faculty of Mathematics, Physics and Informatics, University of Gdańsk
